ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 60683968) FILED BY RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONERS REMBERTO SAINEZ TRUST C/O REMBERTO SAINEZ, TRUSTEE, ERIKA SILVA SAINEZ'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT THERE WAS PREJUDICIAL ABUSE OF DISCRETION IN THE RENT BOARD'S DECISION, WHICH FOUND THAT (1) ALFREDO FAUSTO-SUAREZ WAS NOT A TENANT IN OCCUPANCY, WHILE JUAN HERNADEZ, JULIO ESTRADA AND MOISES HERNANDEZ WERE TENANTS IN OCCUPANCY WITHIN THE MEANING OF REGULATION 1.21; (2) REGULATION 6.14 DID NOT AUTHORIZE RENT INCREASE BECAUSE THE LANDLORD DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT 6.14 NOTICE HAS BEEN PROPERLY SERVED; AND (3) THAT THE LANDLORD FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE MASTER TENANT ALFRED FAUSTO SUAREZ NO LONGER PERMANENTLY RESIDED AT THE PREMISES WITHIN THE MEANING OF COSTA-HAWKINS (DISTINGUISHING THE REQUIREMENTS OF COSTA-HAWKINS FROM THE REQUIREMENTS OF REGULATION 1.21). ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joanna Kozubal (415-864-6962) for Petitioners/Moving party REMBERTO SAINEZ TRUST C/O REMBERTO SAINEZ, TRUSTEE, ERIKA SILVA SAINEZ.
Wayne K. Snodgrass (415-554-4675) Deputy City Attorney City and County of San Francisco for Respondent/opposing party San Francisco Residential Rent Board.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. Plaintiff ARGUED re: 121 Petition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONERS REMBERTO SAINEZ TRUST C/O REMBERTO SAINEZ, TRUSTEE, ERIKA SILVA SAINEZ'S Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden to show that there was prejudicial abuse of discretion in the Rent Board's decision, which found that (1) Alfredo Fausto-Suarez was not a tenant in occupancy, while Juan Hernadez, Julio Estrada and Moises Hernandez were tenants in occupancy within the meaning of regulation 1.21; (2) Regulation 6.14 did not authorize rent increase because the landlord did not establish that 6.14 notice has been properly served; and (3) that the landlord failed to establish that the master tenant Alfred Fausto Suarez no longer permanently resided at the premises within the meaning of Costa-Hawkins (distinguishing the requirements of Costa-Hawkins from the requirements of Regulation 1.21). Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Continued To Sep-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS REMBERTO SAINEZ TRUST C/O REMBERTO SAINEZ, TRUSTEE, ERIKA SILVA SAINEZ'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to September 21, 2017. Petitioner to provide a hard copy of the administrative record no later than September 6, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
